overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a foggy night walk through the Rancho Coronado suburban neighborhood. The player moves along misty streets lined with palm trees and power lines, approaches a massive illuminated circular billboard structure, and continues past it through the residential area.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the foggy sidewalk through a residential neighborhood with palm trees

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining both sides of the street visible through the fog
overhead power lines and utility poles stretching along the street
illuminated street lamps casting diffuse light through the fog
residential buildings with glowing windows on the left side

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a foggy suburban street at night. Tall palm trees and power lines line the path while suburban houses with glowing windows sit on the left. The atmosphere is quiet and empty with artificial street lighting cutting through the dense fog.

events.description: pedestrian appears walking toward the camera on the sidewalk
large illuminated circular billboard becomes visible ahead through the fog

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the sidewalk approaching a large illuminated structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive cylindrical billboard structure with illuminated advertisements rotating at the top

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a distinctive large circular billboard structure that dominates the foggy skyline. A pedestrian walks toward the camera on the sidewalk. The lighting shifts from pure street lighting to a mix with the billboard's neon glow as the structure grows larger in the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular billboard structure and adjacent buildings

events.description: camera turns slightly to view the billboard structure from the side as passing by

agents.ego_description: walking around the base of the billboard structure, observing it from different angles

entered.detail: building with american flag hanging near the entrance
vehicle parked near the sidewalk under the structure

segments.scene_description: The camera moves directly beneath and around the massive circular billboard, which bathes the area in colorful neon light. The view shifts to show the structure from the side and back, revealing adjacent buildings with an American flag and parked vehicles. The palm trees now appear in the distance as the camera moves past the structure.

events.description: exiting the billboard area back to the open residential street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk away from the billboard structure

entered.detail: large electrical transmission tower with red warning lights visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera moves away from the billboard structure and returns to the quieter residential street. The large circular billboard fades into the fog behind as the view opens up to show more palm trees, suburban houses, and a distant power tower. The lighting returns to the dimmer street lamp illumination.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a foggy suburban neighborhood that transitions from a dim residential street into the vibrant glow of a massive neon landmark before returning to the quiet night. It begins with a walk along a misty road lined with tall palm trees and houses with glowing windows, where artificial street lighting cuts through the dense haze. As the camera advances, a large circular billboard emerges to dominate the skyline, shifting the lighting from pale street lamps to a colorful neon radiance as a lone pedestrian passes by. The scene then moves directly beneath and around the towering structure, revealing adjacent buildings and an American flag before the camera pivots away from the light. Finally, the billboard fades back into the fog as the view opens up to a dimmer residential stretch of palm trees and a distant power tower.
